title: Nothing launches advanced AI dictation tool supporting 100+ languages
description: Nothing has unveiled a new on-device dictation tool that leverages AI technology to enhance voice-to-text capabilities. The tool is designed to support over 100 languages, making it accessible for a diverse range of users. This innovation aims to improve productivity and communication across various platforms.

title: Rihanna arrives over 7 hours late at Fenty Beauty event. Frustrated influencers post AI images
description: During her stay in Mumbai, Rihanna made several high-profile appearances, including an intimate luncheon hosted by the Ambani family at their iconic residence, Antilia.

title: Google commits up to $40 billion to AI firm Anthropic
description: In a significant move to bolster its AI capabilities, Google has announced plans to invest as much as $40 billion in the AI research company Anthropic. This investment comes shortly after Amazon made a smaller investment in the same firm, highlighting the growing competition among tech giants in the AI sector. The funding is expected to enhance Anthropic's development of advanced AI technologies and research initiatives.

title: Supermicro Adds Largest Silicon Valley Campus - New DCBBS Facility to Advance the Delivery of Next-Generation AI Data Centers

title: China blocks Meta’s $2 billion acquisition of AI firm Manus
